response.justification: The candidate has some relevant experience with C++ and has worked on various software development projects, but lacks direct experience in industrial automation and cloud platform solutions.
strengths: Proven C++ development experience at National Instruments
Strong background in software development with various technologies
Experience with test-driven development and software craftsmanship
concerns: Lack of direct experience in industrial automation
No clear experience with cloud platform solutions or Microsoft Azure
Not directly familiar with IEC 62443 industrial-cybersecurity standards
